title: salvia mekongensis var. mekongensis
intro: Salvia mekongensis var. mekongensis is a subspecies of plant in the Salvia genus, commonly known as red salvia or dragon's breath. Native to Southeast Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia mekongensis var. mekongensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Salvia mekongensis var. mekongensis is often consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a spice to add flavor to various dishes.
